entries.source: A Pay Intelligence feature that offers powerful analytics for data analysis, visualization, and insights.
entries.target: A Pay Intelligence feature that offers powerful analytics for data analysis, visualisation, and insights.

entries.source: A Performance Management feature that enables HR Administrators to create behavior libraries that workers can then use to highlight specific actions in the feedback they offer.
entries.target: A Performance Management feature that enables HR Administrators to create behaviour libraries that workers can then use to highlight specific actions in the feedback they offer.

entries.source: A Performance Management feature that offers a smart search detecting unprofessional words according to a customizable list.
entries.target: A Performance Management feature that offers a smart search detecting unprofessional words according to a customisable list.

entries.target: A plan with that code already exists.

entries.source: A smart search for specific words that are considered unprofessional or deemed sensitive in your organization will be performed. A standard set of words is provided, but the list of words can be customized after activating the settings below, using the “Update sensitive word list” button.
entries.target: A smart search for specific words that are considered unprofessional or deemed sensitive in your organisation will be performed. A standard set of words is provided, but the list of words can be customised after activating the settings below, using the “Update sensitive word list” button.

entries.source: Activate our powerful analytics framework for in-depth data analysis, data visualization, and business/operational insights. Users need the "Analytics" professional role to access these dashboards.
entries.target: Activate our powerful analytics framework for in-depth data analysis, data visualisation, and business/operational insights. Users need the "Analytics" professional role to access these dashboards.

entries.source: Allow managers to conduct structured discussions with their direct reports. Using dedicated widgets, they can comment on areas such as performance, goals, and behaviors. Once finalized, workers can review comments and either accept the check-in, or propose a follow-up meeting directly from the check-in page.
entries.target: Allow managers to conduct structured discussions with their direct reports. Using dedicated widgets, they can comment on areas such as performance, goals, and behaviours. Once finalised, workers can review comments and either accept the check-in, or propose a follow-up meeting directly from the check-in page.

entries.source: Currently, our company does not have a formal behavior library in place. However, we are diligently working on creating one to better serve our organizational goals. We appreciate your understanding and anticipate sharing our progress with you in the near future.
entries.target: Currently, our company does not have a formal behaviour library in place. However, we are diligently working on creating one to better serve our organisational goals. entries.source:
For your conversation, reflect on your behavior profile and think about occurrences when you demonstrated each behavior, or how you can focus on them in the future. Reflect on any feedback or insights you have received from your colleagues and whether you can use these to highlight any examples you have.
Notice any gaps in your wheel? Request feedback now from your peers and stakeholders on any key behaviors.
entries.target:
For your conversation, reflect on your behaviour profile and think about occurrences when you demonstrated each behaviour, or how you can focus on them in the future. Request feedback on key behaviors now from your peers and stakeholders.

entries.source: Managers will be able to create performance check-ins with their direct reports. The check-ins include widgets in which managers can give their view on a direct report's progress, their overall performance, their goals, and their behaviors. Once the check-in is submitted, workers will be able to see these widgets and decide whether to select "Accept" or "Let's Meet" on the check-in page.
entries.target: Managers will be able to create performance check-ins with their direct reports. The check-ins include widgets in which managers can give their view on a direct report's progress, their overall performance, their goals, and their behaviours. Once the check-in is submitted, workers will be able to see these widgets and decide whether to select "Accept" or "Let's Meet" on the check-in page.

entries.source:
Once a review is closed, it is finalized and no longer editable by either the manager or the worker. However, both parties can still view the content and download the review as a PDF for reference.

Note that reviews are processed in the background. Depending on the number of selected reviews, you might still see some forms temporarily in other stages they are being processed. You may continue using the application and perform other actions while the updates are applied.
entries.target:
Once a review is closed, it is finalised and no longer editable by either the manager or the worker. However, both parties can still view the content and download the review as a PDF for reference.
